hero.title: Together, we change lives in Togo
hero.subtitle: For over 15 years, Azaetogo has been supporting Togolese families and students in their access to education and social well-being.

mission.title: What drives us
mission.p1: For over 15 years, Azaetogo has worked to improve access to education, healthcare, and social integration for young people and families in Togo.
mission.p2: Every year, we support hundreds of beneficiaries through our assistance, training, and community development programs.

donate.title: Support our mission
donate.subtitle: Every donation directly contributes to education and well-being for Togolese families.

footer.description: Togolese humanitarian NGO working for access to education and well-being for Togolese families and students.
